name: Smallstep
description: Smallstep — open source PKI, mutual TLS, and SSH certificate authority for zero-trust infrastructure.

seo.title: Smallstep — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Smallstep: Smallstep — open source PKI, mutual TLS, and SSH certificate authority for zero-trust infrastructure.

when_to_use: mTLS certificate automation for zero-trust microservices
SSH certificate authority for short-lived infrastructure access
ACME server for internal PKI without public CA dependency
JWK and OIDC-based identity-linked certificate issuance
Developer-friendly PKI for cloud-native service mesh security

pros: Modern open-source CA with ACME support
First-class mTLS and SSH certificate flows
step CLI is pleasant to use
cons: Commercial tier required for full features
Smaller ecosystem than legacy PKI vendors
review.verdict: The best developer experience in open-source PKI today; ideal for internal mTLS and zero-trust.
review.best_for: Platform teams rolling out internal mTLS and SSH certs with sane UX.
review.not_for: Orgs needing full public-trust CA services at scale.
